response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matched the Reference JSON's structure, but the Japanese original lyrics (reference_lyrics_og) were completely missing from the reference data. 2. JSON Usage: Used the reference English translation but performed 100% manual transcription of the Japanese vocals, utilizing the on-screen burnt-in lyrics as the primary fallback. Corrected minor translation discrepancies (e.g., translating 'あの目を忘れない' as 'I won't forget those eyes' instead of 'I won't forget that day' to align with the Japanese text). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the introductory talk accurately in English, and added a visual subtitle during the song's intro credits to translate on-screen text during the instrumental silence. Timed the song segments precisely to the vocal cues.

subtitles.original: We were able to release our very first original song!
subtitles.english: We were able to release our very first original song!

subtitles.original: Going to be a ballad!
subtitles.english: Going to be a ballad!

subtitles.original: And then for our second anniversary, we were able to release Lifetime Showtime!
subtitles.english: And then for our second anniversary, we were able to release Lifetime Showtime!

subtitles.original: Our original song that's been on with us along this journey!
subtitles.english: Our original song that's been on with us along this journey!

subtitles.original: Yeah, very special song.
subtitles.english: Yeah, very special song.

subtitles.original: And you know, for FuwaMoco, singing and dancing is something that means so much to us!
subtitles.english: And you know, for FuwaMoco, singing and dancing is something that means so much to us!

subtitles.original: Yeah, music! And Ruffians...
subtitles.english: Yeah, music! And Ruffians...

subtitles.original: ...might have heard that you'd like to hear more from us, too, right?
subtitles.english: ...might have heard that you'd like to hear more from us, too, right?

subtitles.original: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah! What do you think?
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah! What do you think?

subtitles.original: Well...
subtitles.english: Well...

subtitles.original: Our announcement is...
subtitles.english: Our announcement is...

subtitles.original: Drumroll! Okay, drumroll, Ruffians!
subtitles.english: Drumroll! Okay, drumroll, Ruffians!

subtitles.original: Prrrrrrrrrr...
subtitles.english: Prrrrrrrrrr...

subtitles.original: A new original song!
subtitles.english: A new original song!

subtitles.original: Yes! Original song!
subtitles.english: Yes! Original song!

subtitles.original: And this song, it's extra special!
subtitles.english: And this song, it's extra special!

subtitles.original: It's written by none other than the legendary rock idol song composer, Matsukuma Kenta-san!
subtitles.english: It's written by none other than the legendary rock idol song composer, Matsukuma Kenta-san!

subtitles.original: Who works with many famous idol groups, wow!
subtitles.english: Who works with many famous idol groups, wow!

subtitles.original: Also written music for the idol group that Kuro-chan produces, MAMESHiBA NO TAiG0!
subtitles.english: Also written music for the idol group that Kuro-chan produces, MAMESHiBA NO TAiG0!

subtitles.original: But Ruffians, you might be a little bit surprised, okay?
subtitles.english: But Ruffians, you might be a little bit surprised, okay?

subtitles.original: So get ready!
subtitles.english: So get ready!

subtitles.original: Ruffians... with this song...
subtitles.english: Ruffians... with this song...

subtitles.original: ...we'd like to express our roughest feelings as demon dogs.
subtitles.english: ...we'd like to express our roughest feelings as demon dogs.

subtitles.original: DEMON'S RESiDENCE.
subtitles.english: DEMON'S RESiDENCE.

subtitles.original: DEMON'S RESIDENCE / 作詞：海野水玉 作曲：松隈ケンタ 編編：SCRAMBLES
subtitles.english: [Title: DEMON'S RESIDENCE / Lyrics: Mizutama Umino, Music: Kenta Matsukuma, Arrangement: SCRAMBLES]

subtitles.original: 「相棒、どこへ行こうか」 ネオンの脇を抜け
subtitles.english: "Buddy, where shall we go?" Slipping past the neon lights

subtitles.original: バブルガムがはじけたら let's go
subtitles.english: When the bubblegum pops, let's go

subtitles.original: 最低な夜を潜って 僕らは群れをなす
subtitles.english: Slinking through this wretched night, we run in a pack

subtitles.original: 「あの頃よりもマシだね」 my way
subtitles.english: "Better than back then, huh?" my way

subtitles.original: 「不完全なんです」 首輪をつけた
subtitles.english: "It's incomplete," wearing a collar

subtitles.original: 良い子なんかじゃもうイヤ Ah!!
subtitles.english: I'm already fed up with being a good girl, ah!

subtitles.original: DEMON'S RESIDENCE 噛みついていけ
subtitles.english: DEMON'S RESIDENCE, bite down!

subtitles.original: この街は檻のようで
subtitles.english: This city is like a cage

subtitles.original: 気分はどうだい 泣いているのかい
subtitles.english: How do you feel? Are you crying?

subtitles.original: 鎖をちぎって 叫んでいたいんだ stray dogs
subtitles.english: Rip the chains apart, I want to keep screaming, stray dogs

subtitles.original: 彼方へと 飛ぶ鳥を
subtitles.english: Flying towards the distant horizon...

subtitles.original: 見上げるだけかい それでいいのかい
subtitles.english: Is that all you do? Is that enough?

subtitles.original: 燃えるなら ほら青く
subtitles.english: If you're going to burn, then look, burn blue

subtitles.original: 「説教なんかいらない」 スプレー缶振って
subtitles.english: "I don't need any lectures," shaking a spray paint can

subtitles.original: イタズラ書きで彩る runway
subtitles.english: Coloring the runway with graffiti

subtitles.original: 愛情なんか coin toss 誰に bet するのか
subtitles.english: Love is just a coin toss, who are you going to bet on?

subtitles.original: 不確定要素ばかりね lonely
subtitles.english: It's just full of uncertain factors, lonely

subtitles.original: 二人でひとつと決めた
subtitles.english: We decided on one for the two of us

subtitles.original: あの目を忘れない Ah!!
subtitles.english: I won't forget those eyes, ah!

subtitles.original: DEMON'S RESIDENCE 満天の空
subtitles.english: DEMON'S RESIDENCE, a sky full of stars

subtitles.original: あの星がひどく不快で
subtitles.english: That star is terribly unpleasant

subtitles.original: 勝利は上々だ 味はするのかい
subtitles.english: Victory is splendid, can you taste it?

subtitles.original: 鎖を噛んで 唸っていたいんだ stray dogs 僕ら
subtitles.english: Biting the chains, I want to keep growling, stray dogs, us

subtitles.original: 宇宙さえも撃ち落として
subtitles.english: Shooting down even the universe

subtitles.original: 見下ろす奈落 ビルは輝く
subtitles.english: Looking down at the abyss, the buildings shine

subtitles.original: LOL Now I am free!!
subtitles.english: LOL Now I am free!!

subtitles.original: Woah-oh-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh...
subtitles.english: Woah-oh-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh...

subtitles.original: 孤独を分け合い食べた
subtitles.english: Sharing and eating our loneliness

subtitles.original: あの日を忘れない Ah!!
subtitles.english: I won't forget that day, ah!

subtitles.original: 夜を睨んだ stray dogs そうだ
subtitles.english: Staring at the night, stray dogs, that's right

subtitles.original: 怪物は世界のほうさ
subtitles.english: The monster is the world itself

subtitles.original: 抜け出せるのかい 足は動くかい
subtitles.english: Can you escape? Can your legs move?

subtitles.original: 走るなら今
subtitles.english: If you're going to run, do it now

subtitles.original: DEMON'S RESIDENCE stray dogs 僕ら
subtitles.english: DEMON'S RESIDENCE, stray dogs, us

subtitles.original: この街を駆け抜けて行け
subtitles.english: Run through this city

subtitles.original: 地獄の果てに何が見えるかい
subtitles.english: What can you see at the end of hell?

subtitles.original: 鎖をちぎって 叫んでいたいんだ stray dogs 僕ら
subtitles.english: Rip the chains apart, I want to keep screaming, stray dogs, us

subtitles.original: この街は檻のようで
subtitles.english: This city is like a cage

subtitles.original: 君ならどうだい 共に駆けるかい
subtitles.english: How about you? Will you run with me?

subtitles.original: 夜明けが合図だ
subtitles.english: Dawn is the signal...

subtitles.original: 行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go!
